text: I've worked with startups on and off for the last few years. I'm all for moving fast, but I'm always asking what breaks at scale and whether the codebase will survive once the sprint is over. So I push for observability and reliability early, whenever possible.

At MecanTronic I led the team's adoption of AI-assisted development, and adoption of security best practices. At EPIC iO I help productize Computer Vision systems for performance, and I helped define where the 10x factor is realistic and where it isn't; that distinction matters as much as the gains.

Stack: Python (FastAPI/Flask), AWS, PostgreSQL/MySQL, Docker, Terraform. On the AI side: built an LLM content generation system, led a RAG PoC on enterprise data. Neither was perfect, but both taught me what production AI actually requires.
I've worked with English-speaking teams across multiple timezones without issues.
final_greeting: Happy to chat if it sounds like a fit.,
